---
title: "Ch 1: Initial Contact"
subtitle: "Step 1: Run Models"
author: "Molly Caldwell"
date: "2025-02-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(corrr)
library(mclogit)
library(MuMIn)
```

# load interaction data

```{r}
data <- readRDS("~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Code output/gps_contact_data.rds")
```

# pre-model data prep

```{r}
# set all categorical data as factors
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(across(c("time_of_day", "season", "species", "yr", 
                  "travel_state", "contact", "cid"), as.factor))
```

```{r}
# assess correlation between variables of interest
# first, the landscape scale GIS metrics & behavioral metrics
data %>%
  select(herb_biom, tree_cover, TRI_90m, travel_state, 
         time_of_day, HR_size_km2) %>% 
  correlate() %>%
  rearrange() %>%
  shave() 


# then, the local scale GIS metrics & behavioral metrics
data %>%
  select(rel_herb_biom, rel_tree_cover, rel_TRI_90m, 
         travel_state, time_of_day, HR_size_km2) %>% 
  correlate() %>%
  rearrange() %>%
  shave() 

```

```{r}
# scale and center the continuous variables
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(across(c("herb_biom", "tree_cover", "TRI_90m", "HR_size_km2",
                  "rel_herb_biom", "rel_tree_cover",
                  "rel_TRI_90m"), ~as.numeric(scale(.))))

```

# Models
Per species

```{r}
# pull species
spp <- unique(data$species)

# create model list to save all models in
mod_list <- vector("list", 5) 

# create aic list to save aic tables
aic_list <- list()

# run models
for(i in 1:length(spp)){
  print(i)

df <- data %>% filter(species == spp[[i]])

# actual gis global
mod_list[[i]][["global_actual_gis"]] <- mblogit(contact ~ herb_biom +
                          tree_cover +
                          TRI_90m +
                          time_of_day +
                          HR_size_km2 +
                          travel_state +
                          season,
                          random = (~1|cid),
                          data = df)


#relative GIS global
mod_list[[i]][["global_relative_gis"]] <-  mblogit(contact ~ rel_herb_biom +
                          rel_tree_cover +
                          rel_TRI_90m +
                          time_of_day +
                          HR_size_km2 +
                          travel_state +
                          season,
                          random = (~1|cid),
                          data = df)


# now, compare spatial environment vs spatial and social behavior models
mod_list[[i]][["spatial"]] <- mblogit(contact ~ herb_biom +
                          tree_cover +
                          TRI_90m +
                          season,
                          random = (~1|cid),
                          data = df)


mod_list[[i]][["behav"]] <- mblogit(contact ~ 
                          HR_size_km2 +
                          time_of_day +
                          travel_state +
                          season,
                          random = (~1|cid),
                          data = df)

mod_list[[i]][["null"]] <- mblogit(contact ~ 1,
                          random = (~1|cid),
                          data = df)


# full aic table
aic_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
  model = names(mod_list[[i]]),
  AIC = sapply(mod_list[[i]], AIC),
  df = sapply(mod_list[[i]], function(m) attr(logLik(m), "df"))
)

# Calculate delta AIC
aic_list[[i]]$deltaAIC <- aic_list[[i]]$AIC - min(aic_list[[i]]$AIC)

# Calculate Akaike weights
aic_list[[i]]$weight <- with(aic_list[[i]], {
  delta <- deltaAIC
  rel_lik <- exp(-0.5 * delta)
  rel_lik / sum(rel_lik)
})

# Order by AIC
aic_list[[i]] <- aic_list[[i]][order(aic_list[[i]]$AIC), ]

# round values
aic_list[[i]] <- aic_list[[i]] %>% 
  mutate_if(is.numeric, ~round(., digits = 2))

}

```

```{r}
# save aic tables as csv
for(i in 1:length(aic_list)){
write.csv(aic_list[[i]], row.names = FALSE,
          file = paste0("~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Code output/InitialContact_AICtab_", spp[i], ".csv"))
}
```

```{r}
# save top model per species
top_mods <- list(mod_list[[1]][["global_actual_gis"]],
                 mod_list[[2]][["global_actual_gis"]],
                 mod_list[[3]][["global_actual_gis"]],
                 mod_list[[4]][["global_actual_gis"]],
                 mod_list[[5]][["global_relative_gis"]])

names(top_mods) <- spp

saveRDS(top_mods, "~/OneDrive - University of Wyoming/Documents/UWyo/PhD project/PhD_Chapter_1/Code output/InitialContact_TopModel.rds")
```
